title: viola procerior
intro: Viola procerior, also known as the early dog violet, is a perennial plant belonging to the violet family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Viola procerior include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and act as an antiseptic to prevent infections. Viola procerior can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to alleviate respiratory issues, promote relaxation, and support overall well-being.
